pi_items.source: Verified via setup_task.sh and setup_libreoffice_base.sh scripts which copy from /opt/libreoffice_base_samples/chinook.odb to /home/ga/chinook.odb
This is the name of the query the task requires the agent to create, not a pre-existing object in the database

Code analysis of create_chinook_odb.py and verification of generated HSQLDB script. The create_chinook_odb.py script reads table names from SQLite database (which has lowercase names) and creates HSQLDB tables with quoted identifiers: PUBLIC."customers" and PUBLIC."invoices". Verified by running the script against the Chinook SQLite database.

HSQLDB 1.8 documentation confirms all three functions are supported: DATEDIFF for date difference calculation, MIN and MAX as standard SQL aggregate functions. Verified via https://hsqldb.org/doc/guide/builtinfunctions-chapt.html
Analysis of Chinook database shows all 59 customers have tenure > 1095 days (min: 1151 days, max: 1788 days). The filter threshold is valid and will return all customers in the dataset.
install_libreoffice_base.sh script downloads Chinook SQLite from GitHub repository at https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database/raw/master/ChinookDatabase/DataSources/Chinook_Sqlite.sqlite
Direct query of customers table in Chinook SQLite database: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers = 59
Direct query of invoices table in Chinook SQLite database: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM invoices = 412
Analysis of Chinook database invoices table showing earliest invoice: 2009-01-01, latest invoice: 2013-12-14
Calculated from invoices table: MIN(DATEDIFF(MAX(InvoiceDate), MIN(InvoiceDate)) for each customer) = 1151 days
Calculated from invoices table: MAX(DATEDIFF(MAX(InvoiceDate), MIN(InvoiceDate)) for each customer) = 1788 days
All 59 customers in the Chinook database have tenure exceeding 1095 days. Minimum tenure is 1151 days.

privileged_info_summary: The Chinook database contains 59 customers and 412 invoices from a digital media store spanning 2009-2013. The actual database tables are lowercase 'customers' and 'invoices' (not capitalized as claimed in metadata). All customers have tenure exceeding 1095 days (range: 1151-1788 days). The data is synthetic (customers and invoices are manually created with fictitious information, though media data comes from real iTunes library). HSQLDB 1.8 supports all required functions: DATEDIFF, MIN, and MAX. Database is loaded from public GitHub repository (lerocha/chinook-database).
